description: Breadth-vs-depth: does retrieval surface ALL the distinct sources a broad query needs, not just the top one? Each fixture's subtype is one of enumeration / cross_region_survey / broad_theme.
capture_method: Ground truth is derived by searching the text/ corpus DIRECTLY (rg over text/chs), independent of what the retrieval stack returns — so it captures relevant sources retrieval MISSES rather than only confirming what it already surfaces. (An earlier draft seeded from MCP retrieve output, which is circular and undercounts misses: e.g. corpus search finds 57 official sources for the Five Sinners and an official Pantalone source, both of which retrieval failed to surface.) Each facet is anchored by one or more verbatim passages drawn from authoritative sources; a facet counts as covered if ANY of its passages matches. Passages are anchored by text — not file_id/chunk_index/score — so the fixture survives re-chunking, re-embedding, path renames, and reranker changes. The breadth/top-K limitation is then measured at eval time by running retrieval and matching these passages against retrieved text (see istaroth.rag.eval.retrieval / `rag_tools.py eval-retrieval`).
caveat: Passages are matched by whitespace-normalized containment against a relevant chunk's rendered text. Each passage is just the relevant portion that identifies the source — a short, distinctive, verbatim slice — NOT the whole chunk; the surrounding context is not asserted. Keep it long enough to be unambiguous but no longer. If a passage stops matching after a corpus regeneration, the underlying text changed and the fixture should be re-derived, not the matcher loosened. NOTE: with ISTAROTH_QUERY_TRANSFORMER=rewrite the LLM rewrite makes retrieval non-deterministic, so a facet's rank (and tail/MISSING status) wobbles run-to-run; for a stable A/B baseline use the identity transformer or average several runs.

fixtures.query: 坎瑞亚和大灾难的历史
fixtures.rationale: The Cataclysm is referenced in every nation plus many books and character stories, so genuinely-relevant sources are spread across ~17 distinct files with a smoothly decaying relevance curve (no cliff). A fixed top-K slices arbitrarily through the relevant band; facets like the Five Sinners detail, the Black Serpent Knights, the abyss-order's motive, and Kaeya's spy backstory live deep in the ranking yet are not redundant with the head.

relevant_passages.passage: 一群不再信仰神的人们在须弥地底建立无神的国度坎瑞亚。
relevant_passages.label: 诗漱世界观手册·坎瑞亚的建立

relevant_passages.passage: 五百年前，是众神一同降临，覆灭了坎瑞亚。
relevant_passages.label: 戴因斯雷布·众神覆灭坎瑞亚

relevant_passages.passage: 关于坎瑞亚的事，我知道的应该比你们多。
relevant_passages.label: 戴因斯雷布的视角

relevant_passages.passage: 「贤者」海洛塔帝，「预言家」维瑟弗尼尔，「黄金」莱茵多特，「极恶骑」苏尔特洛奇，以及「猎月人」雷利尔。
relevant_passages.label: 戴因列出五大罪人姓名

relevant_passages.passage: 师父——他的真名叫做苏尔特洛奇——
relevant_passages.label: 丝柯克角色故事·其师苏尔特洛奇为五罪人之一（rg 找到的替代来源）

relevant_passages.passage: 其余六神（温迪、钟离、雷电真、厄歌莉娅、玛薇卡、白沙皇）均被召集前往坎瑞亚抗击深渊。
relevant_passages.label: 诗漱世界观手册·七神出征坎瑞亚

relevant_passages.passage: 灾难的降临是伴随着禁忌知识的污染而出现的
relevant_passages.label: 大慈树王·禁忌知识与世界树

relevant_passages.passage: 在侵袭而来的深渊面前，无论是人类还是妖精还是神明，都无比渺小。
relevant_passages.label: 菲林斯·深渊的本质

relevant_passages.passage: 坎瑞亚是被神覆灭的国度，而这就是…深渊教团想要覆灭七神国度的原因。
relevant_passages.label: 戴因·深渊教团的动机

relevant_passages.passage: 漆黑的大蛇——恶龙，「杜林」从海上升起，阴影迫近了蒙德。
relevant_passages.label: 蒙德传说·恶龙杜林

relevant_passages.passage: 千岩的干城与漆黑的军势相撞
relevant_passages.label: 诗漱世界观手册·璃月受灾

relevant_passages.passage: 原本纳塔的地脉就相较之下更为特殊和脆弱
relevant_passages.label: 蒂图·纳塔地脉受灾

relevant_passages.passage: 抵达那里时，最惨烈的战斗已经结束了。
relevant_passages.label: 雷电将军（影）目睹坎瑞亚战场

relevant_passages.passage: 当初除我以外的七神都被召集前往名为坎瑞亚的国度，而我却有另一项更加重要的任务。
relevant_passages.label: 大慈树王·须弥与世界树之责

relevant_passages.passage: 他是坎瑞亚安插在蒙德的棋子，理应为坎瑞亚效力。
relevant_passages.label: 凯亚·坎瑞亚间谍身世

relevant_passages.passage: 那是古坎瑞亚语的「快逃」。
relevant_passages.label: 戴因·坎瑞亚遗迹的黑蛇骑士

relevant_passages.passage: 「救世主」的名号便是那个时期，相信这种论调的人对公主殿下的爱称。
relevant_passages.label: 戴因·灾变前对旅行者血亲的「救世主」称呼

relevant_passages.passage: 于是坎瑞亚人就向龙脊雪山派出了一队机器人，想要夺取寒天之钉
relevant_passages.label: 诗漱世界观手册·坎瑞亚夺钉计划

fixtures.notes: five_sinners and khaenriah_origin are first attested in the non-official 诗漱 worldbook; the official Five Sinners naming sits deep in the ranking. abyss_order_motive, black_serpent_knights, traveler_sibling, and kaeya_spy are the facets most often lost to a small top-K.

fixtures.query: 愚人众执行官有哪些成员，他们分别做了什么
fixtures.rationale: There are 11 Harbinger seats, each with its own quests and character stories, so the answer has a built-in breadth floor of 11 distinct sources. A flat top-K cannot give per-member depth: most seats are attested by a single roster table or a passing voice-line, while the dedicated profiles for the lower-ranked members sit deep in the ranking. Pantalone is attested only by the non-official worldbook roster.

relevant_passages.passage: 他是愚人众最初的执行官，也是今日执行官们的领袖
relevant_passages.label: 公子语音·关于丑角皮耶罗

relevant_passages.passage: 我曾见过他在战场上的模样，实在是过于强悍了。
relevant_passages.label: 公子语音·关于队长卡皮塔诺

relevant_passages.passage: 愚人众执行官「博士」在蒙德也有过多次犯罪行为。
relevant_passages.label: 法尔伽·博士多托雷的罪行

relevant_passages.passage: 我不明白那个女孩为什么是「第三席」。
relevant_passages.label: 公子语音·关于少女哥伦比娅

relevant_passages.passage: 正是如今的愚人众执行官第四席，「仆人」阿蕾奇诺。
relevant_passages.label: 阿蕾奇诺角色故事·第四席仆人

relevant_passages.passage: 愚人众执行官第六席，「散兵」。
relevant_passages.label: 散兵自我介绍·第六席

relevant_passages.passage: 愚人众执行官第十一位，「公子」，其战绩威名远扬。
relevant_passages.label: 角色档案·达达利亚第十一席

relevant_passages.passage: 就是现在身处挪德卡莱的…「木偶」。
relevant_passages.label: 卓新·木偶桑多涅的部队

relevant_passages.passage: 他看我的眼神，就像看待家人一样。
relevant_passages.label: 公子语音·关于公鸡普尔奇内拉

relevant_passages.passage: 刚才的愚人众执行官，抢走「神之心」以后，马上就离开了呢。
relevant_passages.label: 温迪·女士抢走神之心

relevant_passages.passage: 潘塔罗涅卡财务审批卡得非常紧
relevant_passages.label: 木偶的笔记本·潘塔罗涅掌管愚人众财务（rg 找到的官方来源）

relevant_passages.passage: 以金钱的名义，我会遵守我们之间的『契约』
relevant_passages.label: 诗漱世界观手册·潘塔罗涅（非官方替代来源）

fixtures.notes: Every seat has official corpus attestation (corpus search shows pantalone described as the Fatui's financier in 木偶的笔记本/虚空劫灰往世书, contradicting the earlier retrieval-seeded assumption that it was non-official only). Retrieval nonetheless ranks several seats' dedicated sources deep (servant/Arlecchino, scaramouche) or fails to surface them, so a small top-K yields a roster mention without per-member depth. Filter passages by `official` to measure official-only coverage.

fixtures.query: 神之眼在不同地区的人们眼中代表什么
fixtures.rationale: The query explicitly asks for diversity across regions, but the relevance curve is extremely flat and the head is dominated by a single region (Inazuma). A fixed top-K returns a region-skewed sample; the Fontaine, Sumeru, canonical-definition, and philosophical outsider perspectives all sit deep in the ranking. Two near-identical Traveler character-story variants also carry the same passage, so a naive top-K spends adjacent slots on duplicate content.

relevant_passages.passage: 帝君曾言，「神之眼」代表的是一份责任
relevant_passages.label: 闲云·神之眼代表责任（璃月）

relevant_passages.passage: 神之眼便代表着那个人的愿望
relevant_passages.label: 托马·神之眼代表愿望（稻妻）

relevant_passages.passage: 拥有「神之眼」，就像成为骑士一样无用。
relevant_passages.label: 迪卢克·从神之眼到火焰信念（蒙德）

relevant_passages.passage: 部族首领觉得这是对他忘我工作的嘉奖，隔壁奶奶觉得这是对他牺牲精神的补偿。
relevant_passages.label: 伊法·众人的不同解读（纳塔）

relevant_passages.passage: 肯定会有人基于各种原因对它产生兴趣
relevant_passages.label: 莱欧斯利·把神之眼藏起来的务实态度（枫丹）

relevant_passages.passage: 证明力量的「神之眼」。但对他来说未必能有那么崇高的意义。
relevant_passages.label: 艾尔海森·神之眼不过是有用的辅助品（须弥）

relevant_passages.passage: 受神认可者所获的外置魔力器官，用以引导元素之力。
relevant_passages.label: 钟离·神之眼的权威定义

relevant_passages.passage: 你自己是得不到「神之眼」的。外界生物不属于世间众生
relevant_passages.label: 旅行者角色故事·外界生物的旁观视角

fixtures.known_redundancy: The outsider_view and canonical_definition passages appear verbatim in two near-identical Traveler character-story files (male/female protagonist variants), so a naive top-K commonly returns both as adjacent results — a wasted breadth slot that a dedup/MMR pass should reclaim.
fixtures.notes: At a small top-K the result is Inazuma-heavy; fontaine, sumeru, canonical_definition, and outsider_view typically only arrive deeper in the ranking. This is the strongest case where the query semantics themselves demand breadth.

fixtures.query: 七神分别是谁，掌管什么元素与理想
fixtures.rationale: The seven Archons are one per nation, each elaborated in that nation's own quests and character stories, so a full answer needs ~7 distinct sources. One Zhongli exposition names three at once (anemo/geo/electro), but the remaining four — dendro, hydro, pyro, and especially the sparsely-documented cryo Tsaritsa — live in separate, regionally-scattered sources that a small top-K drops.

relevant_passages.passage: 风神是「自由」之神、岩神是「契约」之神，而雷电将军是追求「永恒」的神。
relevant_passages.label: 钟离阐述三神理想（送仙，一处覆盖风/岩/雷）

relevant_passages.passage: 智慧之神力量的具现。
relevant_passages.label: 纳西妲·智慧之神（草神）

relevant_passages.passage: 正义之神的我，与这位异乡的旅者在法庭上展开对决吧！
relevant_passages.label: 芙宁娜·正义之神（水神）

relevant_passages.passage: 芙卡洛斯邀请他来枫丹廷看看
relevant_passages.label: 那维莱特故事·水神芙卡洛斯（rg 找到的替代来源）

relevant_passages.passage: 火神玛薇卡大人。
relevant_passages.label: 玛薇卡·火神（纳塔）

relevant_passages.passage: 承担为「冰之女皇」而战的责任
relevant_passages.label: 冰之女皇·冰神（至冬，达达利亚故事中提及）

fixtures.notes: anemo/geo/electro co-locate in the single 送仙 passage, so they stand or fall together on whether that one source is retrieved; the other four facets each need their own regionally-scattered source. cryo (Tsaritsa) is the most weakly attested. To make anemo/geo/electro independently measurable, add per-Archon alternates (温迪/自由, 钟离/契约, 雷电影/永恒) via the corpus-search recipe.

fixtures.query: 天理、天空岛与维系世界的秩序是什么
fixtures.rationale: The 'rules of the world' lore is deliberately scattered across artifact descriptions, readables, and late-game quests rather than concentrated in any one source, so a complete answer must stitch together fragments (the Heavenly Principles, the four executors, Celestia as the gods' realm, ascension on death, the false sky, the descenders). A small top-K returns a couple of fragments and misses the rest.

relevant_passages.passage: 天理之下存在着四大执政，分别司掌生、死、时、空。
relevant_passages.label: 天理之下的四大执政（生死时空）

relevant_passages.passage: 天理创造了提瓦特如今的绝大部分事物
relevant_passages.label: 通天塔·天理创造提瓦特（rg 找到的替代来源）

relevant_passages.passage: 高天之上是神的领域。
relevant_passages.label: 天空岛是神的领域

relevant_passages.passage: 高天的主宰
relevant_passages.label: 最初的那抹月光·高天的主宰（rg 找到的替代来源）

relevant_passages.passage: 降临者，世界树内没有关于他的记录
relevant_passages.label: 通天塔·降临者（rg 找到的替代来源）

relevant_passages.passage: 「神之眼」的持有者在地上行走，当他们离世时，受选者将升入天空。
relevant_passages.label: 受选者离世升入天空（飞升）

relevant_passages.passage: 「霜月」已经进入虚假之天。
relevant_passages.label: 虚假之天（天空是伪造的）

relevant_passages.passage: 降临者又为何筑起拘束生命的天壳？
relevant_passages.label: 降临者筑起拘束生命的天壳

fixtures.notes: celestia_realm and ascension_on_death both come from the Traveler character story, so one source covers two facets. heavenly_principles and four_executors likewise share the 6022 passage. The facets are intentionally spread across content types (quest / character story / artifact) — exactly the kind of cross-type breadth a single top-K under-serves.
